title: Fix Open Positions endpoint to use fapi/v2/positionRisk

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/lib/binance-auth.ts` and `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts`, update every reference to the Binance position risk endpoint from `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v1/positionRisk` to `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk`. Ensure the HMAC-SHA256 signing logic and all other request parameters remain unchanged.

quotes: Esta errado esse nao eh a api correta para oa dados. Devemos usar https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk

acceptanceCriteria: No code in the frontend references the v1 positionRisk endpoint (`fapi/v1/positionRisk`)
All position risk fetch calls use `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk`
HMAC-SHA256 signing, polling interval (5–10 seconds), and credential handling from localStorage remain unchanged
Open Positions section in the Search tab successfully returns and renders live position data from the v2 endpoint

constraints: API Key and Secret Key must never be sent to the backend — credentials stay in localStorage/sessionStorage only
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, ui components)
Only the endpoint URL needs to change — do not alter signing logic, polling interval, or PositionRow rendering
nonGoals: Changing any other Binance API endpoints (tickers, klines, etc.)
Altering authentication or Internet Identity logic
Changing the PositionRow component or its display fields
